settings.app_key_help: Find this in your CaptchaLa dashboard at dash.captcha.la. Required.
settings.app_secret_help: Server-side only. Never expose to the browser.
settings.product_help: bind, popup, float, or embed. bind attaches to the submit button.
settings.lang_help: BCP-47 tag (e.g. ja, pt-BR) or 'auto' to follow the visitor's browser.

test.title: Test connection
test.help_text:
Verifies the saved App Key / App Secret can reach the CaptchaLa
backend. Save your changes before running the test.

lib.not_completed: Please complete the CAPTCHA before continuing.
lib.error: There was an error verifying CAPTCHA. Please try again.
lib.rejected: The CAPTCHA check failed. Please try again.
lib.unknown_error: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
